case_title: SERGE SOROKKO GALLERIES,INC VS. CITIBANK,N.A. ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A. INC, TO FILE CROSSCLAIM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) ADDING CHASE BANK AS 3RD PARTY CROSS-DEFENDANT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SERGE SOROKKO, PRESIDENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERGE SOROKKO GALLERIES,INC
STIPULATION TO ALLOW MATTER TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM AS TO MS. WEISS, AND MR. LAVINE FILED BY SERGE SOROKKO GALLERIES,INC INTUIT,INC
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR SERGE SOROKKO FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERGE SOROKKO GALLERIES,INC
FILING FEE FOR SC-100 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERGE SOROKKO GALLERIES,INC
REMARK:RECEIVED EXHIBITS VIA MAIL FROM DEFNDDANT(INTUIT,INC.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) WILLIAM THAW, BD MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT INTUIT,INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAVID LAVINE, ASST. SEC. OF THE BOARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERGE SOROKKO GALLERIES,INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY SERGE SOROKKO GALLERIES,INC AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK,N INTUIT,INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.00);HANDWRITTEN: "BY FAX" ON DOCUMENT; SERVED JAN-12-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK,N
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY SERGE SOROKKO GALLERIES,INC CITIBANK,N INTUIT,INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2023 - CONTINUED FOR DEFENDANT TO FILE AND SERVE CROSSCLAIM TO APR-18-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SERGE SOROKKO GALLERIES, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SERGE SOROKKO, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT CITI BANK, N.A. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DENISE PAYNE, BRANCH MANAGER. DEFENDANT INTUIT, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY WILLIAMS THAW, BD MANAGER. COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT CITI BANK, N.A. REQUESTS TO CONTINUE THE MATTER FOR DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A. TO FILE AND SERVE CROSSCLAIM TO ADD 3RD PARTY CHASE BANK TO THE CLAIM. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. PLAINTIFF PROVIDED CONTACT INFORMATION TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A. IN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DENISE PAYNE, BRAND MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITIBANK,N

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF SERGE SOROKKO GALLERIES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SERGE SOROKKO, OWNER AND DAVID LEVINE, ASST SECRETARY OF THE BOARD. DEFENDANT INTUIT, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KAREN WEISS, SENIOR COMMUNICATIONS MANAGER. DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DENISE PAYNE, BRANCH MANAGER. NEW STIPULATION FORM FILED FOR NEW LITIGATE REPRESENTATION. OTHER APPEARANCE BY CHASE BANK REPRESENTED BY NINA TOIA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KAREN WEISS, SR. COMMUNICATIONS MGR FILED BY DEFENDANT INTUIT,INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$110.00); HANDWRITTEN: "BY FAX" ON DOCUMENT; SERVED JAN-10-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT INTUIT,INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERGE SOROKKO GALLERIES,INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITIBANK,N INTUIT,INC $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $270.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,270.00, JUDGMENT JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY AGAINST CITIBANK AND INTUIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
